semantic.role: Database Repository (Data Access Object) providing low-level CRUD operations on the 'files' table in an SQLite database, isolating file metadata persistence for the ArchSpine runtime.
responsibilities: Retrieve the file status record (hash, kind, mtime, size) for a given file path via getFileStatus.
Create a new file record if one does not exist via ensureFileRecord.
Update file metadata including hash, kind, locales, mtime, and size via updateFileStatus.
Update file metadata along with an associated SpineUnit document via updateFileStatusWithDocs.
Retrieve the SpineUnit document associated with a file path via getFileDocs.
Delete a file record from the database by path via deleteFile.
List all tracked file paths via getTrackedFiles.
Return global file count status via getGlobalStatus.
outOfScope: Higher-level business logic or orchestration of scan/sync pipelines.
External file system I/O or content hashing.
invariants: Every exported function requires a better-sqlite3 Database instance as the first parameter.
File paths uniquely identify records in the files table.
SpineUnit documents are serialized to JSON strings for storage and deserialized on retrieval.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, isolated data access layer for file metadata persistence, decoupling scanner and engine logic from raw SQL.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 — Architectural Governance & Semantic Layer for the AI Era: establishes foundational file record DAO for the governance and semantic layer runtime.

publicSurface.description: Queries the files table for a file's hash, kind, mtime, and size by file path. Returns undefined if the file is not tracked.
Inserts a new file record with the given path, kind, mtime, and size if one does not already exist.
Updates an existing file record's hash, kind, locales, mtime, and size, setting a new updatedAt timestamp.
Updates a file record with new metadata and serializes a SpineUnit document into the docs column, setting a new updatedAt timestamp.
Retrieves and deserializes the SpineUnit document associated with a file path. Returns undefined if no docs exist.
Deletes the file record identified by the given file path from the database.
Returns an array of all file paths currently tracked in the files table.
Returns a GlobalStatus object containing the total count of tracked files.

English.role: Database Repository (Data Access Object) providing low-level CRUD operations on the 'files' table in an SQLite database, isolating file metadata persistence for the ArchSpine runtime.
responsibilities: Retrieve the file status record (hash, kind, mtime, size) for a given file path via getFileStatus.
Create a new file record if one does not exist via ensureFileRecord.
Update file metadata including hash, kind, locales, mtime, and size via updateFileStatus.
Update file metadata along with an associated SpineUnit document via updateFileStatusWithDocs.
Retrieve the SpineUnit document associated with a file path via getFileDocs.
Delete a file record from the database by path via deleteFile.
List all tracked file paths via getTrackedFiles.
Return global file count status via getGlobalStatus.
outOfScope: Higher-level business logic or orchestration of scan/sync pipelines.
External file system I/O or content hashing.

exports.name: ensureFileRecord
exports.signature:
ensureFileRecord(
  db: Database.Database,
  filePath: string,
  kind: string,
  mtime: number = 0,
  size: number = 0,
)

exports.name: updateFileStatus
exports.signature:
updateFileStatus(
  db: Database.Database,
  filePath: string,
  hash: string,
  kind: string,
  locales: string[] = [],
  mtime: number = 0,
  size: number = 0,
)

exports.name: updateFileStatusWithDocs
exports.signature:
updateFileStatusWithDocs(
  db: Database.Database,
  filePath: string,
  hash: string,
  kind: string,
  spineUnit: SpineUnit,
  locales: string[] = [],
  mtime: number = 0,
  size: number = 0,
)
